overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban street in a video game environment, following a character with a glowing umbrella before continuing past other pedestrians. The scene features neon-lit city streets with graffiti-covered construction barriers and reflective wet pavement.

tall modern glass skyscrapers with lights visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow city sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered construction wall at night. A character carrying a glowing purple umbrella walks ahead and then passes by closely on the left, temporarily obscuring the view. Orange streetlights illuminate the wet concrete pavement while commercial buildings line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown city street with reflective wet pavement

events.description: muscular pedestrian in red tank top approaches from ahead and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the city sidewalk, approaching and passing other pedestrians on the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: muscular person in red tank top and shorts walking toward the camera and passing by on the left

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the neon-lit city street after the umbrella character passes, the construction wall recedes into the distance on the left while the streetlight pole moves closer and shifts to the right side of the frame. A muscular pedestrian in a red tank top approaches from the distance and passes by on the left. The wet pavement continues to reflect the warm orange streetlights and building lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk that shifts from a confined corridor of construction walls to a more open, neon-lit city street. It begins beside a graffiti-covered construction barrier under orange streetlights, where a character with a glowing purple umbrella walks ahead and passes closely on the left, momentarily obscuring the view. As the umbrella character moves away, the camera continues forward, causing the construction wall to recede into the distance while a streetlight pole shifts toward the right side of the frame. The scene then opens up as a muscular pedestrian in a red tank top approaches from the distance and passes by on the left. Finally, the camera glides further down the street, maintaining a view of the wet pavement reflecting the warm orange glow of the surrounding commercial buildings.
